title: How to Restore All Default Icons on Mac After Installing Cursor IDE
author: Baboyiban
text:
I installed Cursor IDE, and all the default icons on my MacBook have been changed. I want to know how to restore all icons back to their original state.
I’ve done some Googling and found ways to change the icon for individual files or folders. However, I’m looking for a solution that allows me to restore or change the icons for all file types at once, not just one file or folder at a time.
